source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-149 Product Description (rev.1).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Product description for H&abyz A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports CE MDR technical documentation by describing manufacturer information, intended purpose, device configuration, classification rationale, specifications, software, materials, and comparable devices.
keyPoints: Manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. at 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
The product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The devices are indicated for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting adults and children, except infants.
The document states the device is classified as Class IIa under Rule 17 of Annex VIII Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
The document states FDA common name Flat Panel Digital X-ray Detector, Device Class II, Regulation Number 21 CFR 892.1680, Product Code MQB.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Intended purpose
concepts.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Purpose
concepts.evidence: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

concepts.name: MDR Class IIa classification
concepts.pageTarget: MDR Class IIa X-ray Diagnostic Image Recording Devices
concepts.evidence: Therefore, this device is classified as Class IIa in accordance with the rule 17 of Annex VIII Regulation (EU) 2017/745.

concepts.name: MDR Annex VIII Rule 17
concepts.evidence: Devices specifically intended for recording of diagnostic images generated by X-ray radiation are classified as class IIa.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer’s Name H&abyz Co., Ltd. Manufacturer’s Address 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The EU authorised representative is JaviTech e.K in Germany.
evidence.evidenceText: Authorised Representative name: JaviTech e.K Address: Sachsenhausener Straße 16, 65824 Schwalbach am Taunus, Germany

evidence.claim: The device product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered model names are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The devices are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors using TFT and CsI scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors... The detector consists of TFT and Scintillator (CsI)
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Technology

evidence.claim: The intended purpose is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: The intended patient population excludes infants and pregnant women.
evidence.evidenceText: Age Adult and Children (except infants)... Patient state except pregnant women
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Patient Population

evidence.claim: The device is not to be used for mammography, infants, or pregnant women.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography. Not to be used for infant and pregnant women.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Contraindications

evidence.claim: The device has no known side effects according to the product description.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW have no known side effects.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Side Effects

evidence.claim: The device is reusable and non-sterile.
evidence.evidenceText: This medical device is not a single use device. This medical device is non-sterile device.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Reuse And Sterility

evidence.claim: The Basic UDI-DI is 88000704HAAP-27U and the issuing entity is GS1.
evidence.evidenceText: Basic UDI-DI 88000704HAAP-27U Issuing entity for the UDI code: GS1

evidence.claim: The applicable NBOG codes listed are MDA 0201 and MDT 2011.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicable NBOG Code MDA 0201 Active non-implantable imaging devices utilising ionizing radiation MDT 2011 Devices which required Packaging, including labelling
evidence.pageTarget: NBOG Codes For X-ray Imaging Devices

evidence.claim: Under MDR Annex VIII Rule 17, the device is classified as Class IIa.
evidence.evidenceText: Therefore, this device is classified as Class IIa in accordance with the rule 17 of Annex VIII Regulation (EU) 2017/745.

evidence.claim: The FDA classification section lists common name Flat Panel Digital X-ray Detector, classification name Stationary X-ray System, Device Class II, regulation number 21 CFR 892.1680, review panel Radiology, and product code MQB.
evidence.evidenceText: Common Name Flat Panel Digital X-ray Detector Classification Name Stationary X-ray System Device Class II Regulation Number 21 CFR 892.1680 510(k) Review Panel Radiology Product Code MQB
evidence.pageTarget: FDA Flat Panel Digital X-ray Detector Classification

evidence.claim: The detector supports Normal Mode and AED Mode.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode Normal Mode AED Mode (Auto Exposure Detection Mode)
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Trigger Modes

evidence.claim: The contact part is the deco sheet, with intact skin contact and limited exposure.
evidence.evidenceText: Contact part Deco sheet... Category Surface medical device Contact Intact skin Duration Limited exposure
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Patient Contact Materials

evidence.claim: Biological evaluation considerations reference EN ISO 10993-1 Annex A with cytotoxicity, sensitization, and irritation of intracutaneous reactivity tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Biological evaluation for consideration according to EN ISO 10993-1 Annex A... Applied tests Cytotoxicity, Sensitization and Irritation of intracutaneous reactivity.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit document date is present in the source text; date-like folder text 230926 was not treated as a document date.
Source metadata authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic, but the document text primarily discusses Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and includes an FDA (U.S.) classification section.
Revision is taken from the sourcePath filename '(rev.1)' because no revision field appears in the body text.
